problem id: a916a770
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND SHR(6)

examples:
  10111111 -> 00000000
  00010101 -> 00000000
  00111001 -> 00000000
  10000110 -> 00000000
  01001100 -> 00000000
  11111111 -> 00000011
  10111101 -> 00000000
  10100111 -> 00000000
  00010111 -> 00000000
  11110100 -> 00000011

query: 10101100
predicted answer: 00000000
